item.title: Mystery explained. #telugupodcast #rohithgollena #rrrshow
item.description:
In this fascinating telugu podcast episode, renowned archaeologist Dr. Emani Sivanagi Reddy joins Rohit Gollena from lazymuscle for an eye-opening conversation on the hidden history, temple mysteries, ancient Indian knowledge systems, and controversial topics that continue to fascinate millions. This episode of RRRshow dives deep into the secrets behind erotic sculptures on Indian temples, the spiritual and scientific meaning hidden in ancient architecture, and the untold truths preserved through centuries of Indian civilization.
Why were erotic sculptures carved on temple walls? Were these sculptures connected to spirituality, tantra, human psychology, or ancient education systems? Dr. Emani Sivanagi Reddy explains the historical, cultural, and archaeological perspectives behind these mysterious temple carvings found across India. From Khajuraho-style symbolism to forgotten temple traditions, this conversation uncovers insights rarely discussed in mainstream media.
The discussion also explores the mystery of Varanasi, considered one of the oldest living cities on the planet. Discover the spiritual significance, ancient history, and archaeological importance of Kashi and why it remains a powerful center of Hindu civilization even today. This telugu podcast further investigates the Yaganti Nandi mystery and the belief that the Nandi idol continues to grow in size over time, attracting devotees and researchers alike.
Another major topic covered is the growing giripradakshina trend in Arunachalam and the spiritual importance of Arunachala temple. Learn why thousands of devotees perform girivalam and how ancient saints connected Arunachalam with cosmic energy and self-realization. Rohith Gollena and Dr. Emani Sivanagi Reddy also discuss the controversial Tejo Mahalaya theory and the ongoing debates surrounding the history of the Taj Mahal.
This episode of lazymuscle podcast also uncovers evidence and stories related to Indian culture in foreign countries, including traces of Sanatana Dharma, temple architecture, Hindu traditions, and ancient Indian influence found across Southeast Asia and other civilizations. The mystery of the Saraswati River is explored in detail, including archaeological findings, Vedic references, and scientific research that continue to fuel debates among historians and scholars.
The conversation takes an interesting turn into Vishnu bhakts vs Shiva bhakts, examining how different devotional traditions evolved within Hinduism while still sharing deep spiritual roots. The episode also covers the famous Karni Mata Temple, known worldwide as the rat temple, where thousands of rats are worshipped and protected as sacred beings according to ancient beliefs and local traditions.
One of the most mind-blowing segments focuses on the construction mystery of the Brihadeeswara Temple. How was such a massive temple built centuries ago without modern machinery? What engineering techniques were used to transport gigantic stones? Dr. Emani Sivanagi Reddy explains the brilliance of ancient Indian temple architecture, Chola engineering, and the scientific precision hidden within these monuments.
If you are interested in Indian archaeology, Hindu temple mysteries, ancient Indian history, spirituality, Sanatana Dharma, unexplained mysteries, Vedic science, temple architecture, or cultural debates, this RRRshow episode is packed with powerful insights and rare knowledge. This telugu podcast is a must-watch for history lovers, devotees, researchers, and anyone curious about India’s forgotten past.
Watch this exclusive conversation with archaeologist Dr. Emani Sivanagi Reddy and host Rohit Gollena only on lazymuscle. Don’t forget to like, share, and subscribe for more deep conversations on Indian history, culture, spirituality, archaeology, and untold mysteries.
#telugupodcast #lazymuscle #RRRshow #rohithgollena #drsivanagireddy #indianhistory #templemysteries #sanatanadharma #varanasi #yaganti #arunachalam #brihadeeswaratemple #saraswatiriver #hindutemples #archaeology #telugu #podcast #ancientindia #spirituality #hinduculture

item.title: ‼️⚠️ POLICE INSIDER STORIES | Ft. IPS CHARU SINHA | DGP - CID, ACB, Women Safety Wing | Raw Talks
item.description:
She walked into a room of 800 angry men alone. She lost her officers to Naxalites. She led sting operations, peacekeeping missions in Kosovo, and built systems that protect women across Telangana. And she did all of it in a uniform that some said didn't belong to her.
IPS Officer Charu Sinha - Lady Singham - sits down with VK for one of the most powerful conversations we've ever had.
Here's what we got into; - How women officers are actually treated inside the police force - Naxalites, kidnappings, dead bodies - and whether she still feels the same after decades of it - Kosovo, Kashmir, Bihar - stories that will stay with you - Dilshuknagar sting operation - when will a girl walk alone at night safely? - SHE Teams, Bharosa Centre, CEIR portal - what actually works on the ground - Assault survivors - how to channel pain and come out the other side - Men are not born insensitive - society makes them that way - This is not just a police story. This is a mirror held up to all of us.
. Disclaimer: This video is for educational purposes only. The opinions expressed by the guests are their personal views and do not reflect our stance. We have no intention of defaming or harming any individual, brand, product, country, or profession mentioned in this video. Our aim is to provide information to help the audience make informed decisions. ~ 00:00:00 Introduction 00:02:54 Dilshuknagar Sting Operation Revealed 00:09:28 How Police Build Child Friendly Spaces 00:10:44 POCSO Act Explained 00:11:52 How SHE Teams Actually Work 00:16:05 Stand With Her Campaign 00:18:51 Anonymity Online and the Danger It Creates 00:22:24 What Telugu Influencers Can Do for Safety 00:29:03 How Women IPS Officers Are Treated in the Force 00:31:28 Women in Policing in Telangana 00:32:46 Pulivendula - 800 Angry Men and One Officer 00:35:42 Her First Crime Scene - What Nobody Prepares You For 00:39:09 Does She Still Feel After Decades of Brutality 00:40:42 The Fishermen Community Untold Story 00:43:16 The Day Naxalites Surrendered 00:44:50 Losing Her Officers to Naxalites 00:46:34 Managing Kidnappings Without Mobile Phones 00:49:48 Karuvu Dhadi - The Real Story 00:53:33 Lost Your Phone in India - Do This 00:56:42 Kosovo UN Peacekeeping Mission 00:59:57 Her Family and Growing Up in Convents 01:03:28 How Rape Cases Are Handled Inside the System 01:04:35 How Assault Survivors Can Heal and Move Forward 01:06:48 VK's Advice to Survivors 01:07:50 The Second Arrow 01:08:10 Chittor Sex Workers and HIV Children 01:12:27 Safety Initiatives That Are Actually Working 01:14:07 AHTU - Anti Human Trafficking Unit 01:18:01 Saahas POSH Helpdesk Explained 01:21:17 Who Creates These Safety Initiatives 01:21:42 How Dial 100 Actually Works 01:23:08 Her Warning to Offenders 01:24:29 The One Person She Trusts Most 01:25:32 What Do We Call People Who Misbehave 01:26:41 Men Are Not Born Insensitive

item.title: DAX in Power BI
item.description:
DAX is what separates Power BI users from Power BI developers.
Most people can drag fields onto a canvas and call it a dashboard.
But the moment someone asks for year-over-year growth, a running total, or a metric that respects filters the way the business actually thinks - you need DAX.
And the first real test is knowing when to use a calculated column vs a measure.
Get that wrong and your model bloats, your reports slow down, and your numbers stop making sense when someone clicks a slicer.
Get it right and you stop being the person who builds reports and you become the person who builds models other people build reports on.
____________________________________________

💻Analyst Builder - https://www.analystbuilder.com/

రూపాయి పతనం: డాలర్‌తో పోలిస్తే మన కరెన్సీ ఎందుకు ఇంత దారుణంగా పడిపోతోంది? రూ. 100 కి వెళ్తుందా? ఈ పతనం వల్ల సామాన్యుడికి జరిగే నష్టం ఏంటి? For Business Inquiries & Brand Collaborations:📧 vrfactsofficial1969@gmail.com
Ee video lo, US Dollar tho poliste Indian Rupee value sudden ga ₹96 ki enduku padipoindi ane vishayam meeda detailed ga analyse cheddam. 2026 lo Asia's worst-performing currency ga Indian Rupee enduku nilichindi? Pakistan and Bangladesh currency la kante manadi enduku weak avthundi?
In this deep dive into global economics and India's currency crisis, we cover:
🔸 Supply and Demand Basics: A simple explanation of how currency valuation works and why the demand for dollars is skyrocketing in India. 🔸 The Middle East War Impact: How the disruption in the Strait of Hormuz and the 50% surge in Brent crude oil prices forced India to spend double the dollars on imports. 🔸 FPI Outflows: The staggering withdrawal of over $40 Billion by Foreign Portfolio Investors from Indian equities and its devastating effect on the Rupee. 🔸 The Current Account Deficit: Understanding India's structural problems with oil, gold, and electronics imports overshadowing IT exports. 🔸 The AI Failure: How missing out on the global AI and semiconductor capital rotation made India vulnerable compared to China and Taiwan. 🔸 The 100 Rupee Fear: Analyzing expert opinions from Arvind Panagariya and Gita Gopinath on whether a ₹100/Dollar exchange rate is just a psychological number or a real economic disaster. 🔸 What You Must Do: Practical steps like reducing gold purchases, controlling fuel consumption, and opting for local goods to save our economy.Asalu Rupee 100 hit avtunda leda? Ee crisis meeda mee opinion ento kinda comment cheyandi!
#VRRaja #IndianRupee #DollarVsRupee #IndianEconomy #RupeeFall #CurrentAffairsTelugu #economiccrisis

item.title: 🚨MODI HUMILIATION In NORWAY? 🤯| What Exactly Happened ? 🤔| Aye Jude ✊
item.description:
Join this channel to get access to perks: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCq9kaXFyF2b6oXQ5veWdvog/join
BUSINESS ENQUIRIES- Contact 📧 info@ayejude.com
In this video, Aye Jude explains Prime Minister Narendra Modi’s multi-country visit covering nations like Norway, Italy, United Arab Emirates, Netherlands, and Sweden. During the Norway visit, a journalist questioned Modi about interactions with the free press, and a controversial headline mentioning “snake charmer” later went viral on social media. The video also discusses a CNN article about Xi Jinping and the reported restrictions on Winnie the Pooh references in China. It further covers allegations involving a journalist in Taiwan accused of sharing sensitive military information with China. The episode also highlights reactions on social media and statements linked to global tensions involving Donald Trump and Iran. With diplomacy, media controversies, and geopolitical tensions all colliding, what bigger global shifts are unfolding behind the scenes?

item.title: 🚨కాశీ గురుంచి మీకు తెలియని నిజాలు | Dr.Siva nagi reddy | Rohith Gollena #telugupodcast
item.description:
In this fascinating telugu podcast episode, renowned archaeologist Dr. Emani Sivanagi Reddy joins Rohit Gollena from lazymuscle for an eye-opening conversation on the hidden history, temple mysteries, ancient Indian knowledge systems, and controversial topics that continue to fascinate millions. This episode of RRRshow dives deep into the secrets behind erotic sculptures on Indian temples, the spiritual and scientific meaning hidden in ancient architecture, and the untold truths preserved through centuries of Indian civilization.
Why were erotic sculptures carved on temple walls? Were these sculptures connected to spirituality, tantra, human psychology, or ancient education systems? Dr. Emani Sivanagi Reddy explains the historical, cultural, and archaeological perspectives behind these mysterious temple carvings found across India. From Khajuraho-style symbolism to forgotten temple traditions, this conversation uncovers insights rarely discussed in mainstream media.
The discussion also explores the mystery of Varanasi, considered one of the oldest living cities on the planet. Discover the spiritual significance, ancient history, and archaeological importance of Kashi and why it remains a powerful center of Hindu civilization even today. This telugu podcast further investigates the Yaganti Nandi mystery and the belief that the Nandi idol continues to grow in size over time, attracting devotees and researchers alike.
Another major topic covered is the growing giripradakshina trend in Arunachalam and the spiritual importance of Arunachala temple. Learn why thousands of devotees perform girivalam and how ancient saints connected Arunachalam with cosmic energy and self-realization. Rohith Gollena and Dr. Emani Sivanagi Reddy also discuss the controversial Tejo Mahalaya theory and the ongoing debates surrounding the history of the Taj Mahal.
This episode of lazymuscle podcast also uncovers evidence and stories related to Indian culture in foreign countries, including traces of Sanatana Dharma, temple architecture, Hindu traditions, and ancient Indian influence found across Southeast Asia and other civilizations. The mystery of the Saraswati River is explored in detail, including archaeological findings, Vedic references, and scientific research that continue to fuel debates among historians and scholars.
The conversation takes an interesting turn into Vishnu bhakts vs Shiva bhakts, examining how different devotional traditions evolved within Hinduism while still sharing deep spiritual roots. The episode also covers the famous Karni Mata Temple, known worldwide as the rat temple, where thousands of rats are worshipped and protected as sacred beings according to ancient beliefs and local traditions.
One of the most mind-blowing segments focuses on the construction mystery of the Brihadeeswara Temple. How was such a massive temple built centuries ago without modern machinery? What engineering techniques were used to transport gigantic stones? Dr. Emani Sivanagi Reddy explains the brilliance of ancient Indian temple architecture, Chola engineering, and the scientific precision hidden within these monuments.
If you are interested in Indian archaeology, Hindu temple mysteries, ancient Indian history, spirituality, Sanatana Dharma, unexplained mysteries, Vedic science, temple architecture, or cultural debates, this RRRshow episode is packed with powerful insights and rare knowledge. This telugu podcast is a must-watch for history lovers, devotees, researchers, and anyone curious about India’s forgotten past.
Watch this exclusive conversation with archaeologist Dr. Emani Sivanagi Reddy and host Rohit Gollena only on lazymuscle. Don’t forget to like, share, and subscribe for more deep conversations on Indian history, culture, spirituality, archaeology, and untold mysteries.
#telugupodcast #lazymuscle #RRRshow #rohithgollena #drsivanagireddy #indianhistory #templemysteries #sanatanadharma #varanasi #yaganti #arunachalam #brihadeeswaratemple #saraswatiriver #hindutemples #archaeology #telugu #podcast #ancientindia #spirituality #hinduculture

In this deep dive into the shocking controversy and communal sensitivity, we cover: 🔸 The Incident Timeline: Tracing Abhinay's journey from independent films to becoming a pastor, and the 48-day padayatra that led to the alleged attack. 🔸 The Viral Video Analysis: Breaking down the 5 major "Red Flags" in the attack video, including the locked car doors, untouched clothes, and mysterious injuries that appeared only later in the hospital. 🔸 The Staged Drama Proofs: Exposing the Instagram messages, voice notes, and confessions from the alleged attackers that proved the incident was completely fabricated for political mileage. 🔸 The Praveen Pagadala Connection: Why Abhinay repeatedly brings up the tragic death of Praveen Pagadala to create a false narrative and gain sympathy. 🔸 The Danger of Fake News: Comparing this incident to the devastating communal riots in Canning (2013) and Kandhamal (2008) to show how one fake rumor can destroy thousands of lives. 🔸 Police Intervention: How the quick action by the local police and the clearance given by MLA Visweswara Raju prevented a massive communal tension in the Paderu tribal area.

item.title: AI Engineer COMPLETE Roadmap [2026]
item.description:
Vishakha Sadhwani: AI Engineer COMPLETE Roadmap [2026]
Learning Resources: https://gdrive.openinapp.co/pa73n
The more I learned about production AI systems, the more I realized that AI Engineering is deeply connected with Cloud, DevOps, backend systems, and infrastructure workflows.
That’s why modern AI Engineering is becoming much more than just prompting or fine-tuning models.
If I had to learn AI Engineering from scratch today, these are the skills I would master.
• Python for automation, APIs, and workflows • Linux + debugging for production systems • APIs + networking for system communication • Cloud + infrastructure for deployment • AI fundamentals for understanding models properly • RAG + LLM systems for modern AI applications • Docker + Kubernetes for scaling workloads • Monitoring + observability for production systems
These are the exact skills that top companies are looking for in AI-focused roles.

Margo's Got Money Troubles
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Margo's Got Money Troubles.

Margo Millet is the daughter of a Hooters waitress and an ex-pro wrestler. Now an unemployed single mother in her early 20s, Margo is struggling to make ends meet, leading her to launch an OnlyFans account. When her father reenters her life, she starts incorporating his lessons from the pro wrestling world into her OnlyFans work, leading to unexpected success.

item.title: Dutton Ranch
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Dutton Ranch.

The Dutton Ranch, home to Beth Dutton and Rip Wheeler, is a testament to the peace they sought, fought for, and nearly died for, as they've come to cherish their 7,000-acre land. With tough times and stiff competition, Beth and Rip do what they must to survive, all while ensuring Carter becomes the man he's supposed to be.

As Beth and Rip fight to build a future together - far from the ghosts of Yellowstone - they collide with brutal new realities and a ruthless rival ranch that will stop at nothing to protect its empire. In South Texas, blood runs deeper, forgiveness is fleeting, and the cost of survival might just be your soul.

item.title: This is our culture #telugupodcast #rohithgollena #indianhistory
item.description:
In this fascinating telugu podcast episode, renowned archaeologist Dr. Emani Sivanagi Reddy joins Rohit Gollena from lazymuscle for an eye-opening conversation on the hidden history, temple mysteries, ancient Indian knowledge systems, and controversial topics that continue to fascinate millions. This episode of RRRshow dives deep into the secrets behind erotic sculptures on Indian temples, the spiritual and scientific meaning hidden in ancient architecture, and the untold truths preserved through centuries of Indian civilization.
Why were erotic sculptures carved on temple walls? Were these sculptures connected to spirituality, tantra, human psychology, or ancient education systems? Dr. Emani Sivanagi Reddy explains the historical, cultural, and archaeological perspectives behind these mysterious temple carvings found across India. From Khajuraho-style symbolism to forgotten temple traditions, this conversation uncovers insights rarely discussed in mainstream media.
The discussion also explores the mystery of Varanasi, considered one of the oldest living cities on the planet. Discover the spiritual significance, ancient history, and archaeological importance of Kashi and why it remains a powerful center of Hindu civilization even today. This telugu podcast further investigates the Yaganti Nandi mystery and the belief that the Nandi idol continues to grow in size over time, attracting devotees and researchers alike.
Another major topic covered is the growing giripradakshina trend in Arunachalam and the spiritual importance of Arunachala temple. Learn why thousands of devotees perform girivalam and how ancient saints connected Arunachalam with cosmic energy and self-realization. Rohith Gollena and Dr. Emani Sivanagi Reddy also discuss the controversial Tejo Mahalaya theory and the ongoing debates surrounding the history of the Taj Mahal.
This episode of lazymuscle podcast also uncovers evidence and stories related to Indian culture in foreign countries, including traces of Sanatana Dharma, temple architecture, Hindu traditions, and ancient Indian influence found across Southeast Asia and other civilizations. The mystery of the Saraswati River is explored in detail, including archaeological findings, Vedic references, and scientific research that continue to fuel debates among historians and scholars.
The conversation takes an interesting turn into Vishnu bhakts vs Shiva bhakts, examining how different devotional traditions evolved within Hinduism while still sharing deep spiritual roots. The episode also covers the famous Karni Mata Temple, known worldwide as the rat temple, where thousands of rats are worshipped and protected as sacred beings according to ancient beliefs and local traditions.
One of the most mind-blowing segments focuses on the construction mystery of the Brihadeeswara Temple. How was such a massive temple built centuries ago without modern machinery? What engineering techniques were used to transport gigantic stones? Dr. Emani Sivanagi Reddy explains the brilliance of ancient Indian temple architecture, Chola engineering, and the scientific precision hidden within these monuments.
If you are interested in Indian archaeology, Hindu temple mysteries, ancient Indian history, spirituality, Sanatana Dharma, unexplained mysteries, Vedic science, temple architecture, or cultural debates, this RRRshow episode is packed with powerful insights and rare knowledge. This telugu podcast is a must-watch for history lovers, devotees, researchers, and anyone curious about India’s forgotten past.
Watch this exclusive conversation with archaeologist Dr. Emani Sivanagi Reddy and host Rohit Gollena only on lazymuscle. Don’t forget to like, share, and subscribe for more deep conversations on Indian history, culture, spirituality, archaeology, and untold mysteries.
#telugupodcast #lazymuscle #RRRshow #rohithgollena #drsivanagireddy #indianhistory #templemysteries #sanatanadharma #varanasi #yaganti #arunachalam #brihadeeswaratemple #saraswatiriver #hindutemples #archaeology #telugu #podcast #ancientindia #spirituality #hinduculture

BUSINESS ENQUIRIES- Contact 📧 info@ayejude.com
In this video Aye Jude explains, the latest global concerns surrounding Hantavirus after international agencies like the World Health Organization began closely monitoring a reported outbreak linked to a cruise ship journey. The video breaks down what Hantavirus is, how it spreads, and why several countries are now taking precautionary measures. It explains that the virus is commonly associated with rodents such as rats and mice and can spread through contact with contaminated surroundings. The episode also discusses the symptoms, safety precautions, and how people can protect themselves in daily life. The video also explores how quickly such incidents can create panic on social media and across countries. But is this situation under control or could it become a larger global health concern in the coming days?

item.title: Movie Review: ‘Star Wars: The Mandalorian and Grogu’
item.description: Opening in theaters on May 22 is ‘Star Wars: The Mandalorian and Grogu,’ directed by Jon Favreau from a screenplay by Favreau, Dave Filoni, and Noah Kloor. The film stars Pedro Pascal ('The Fantastic Four: First Steps'), Jeremy Allen White ('Springsteen: Deliver Me From Nowhere'), Steve Blum ('Transformers One'), Jonny Coyne ('The Toxic Avenger'), Martin Scorsese ('Killers of the Flower Moon'), and Sigourney Weaver ('Avatar: Fire and Ash').

item.title: Om Namah Shivaya🙏 #telugupodcast #rohithgollena #rrrshow
item.description:
In this fascinating telugu podcast episode, renowned archaeologist Dr. Emani Sivanagi Reddy joins Rohit Gollena from lazymuscle for an eye-opening conversation on the hidden history, temple mysteries, ancient Indian knowledge systems, and controversial topics that continue to fascinate millions. This episode of RRRshow dives deep into the secrets behind erotic sculptures on Indian temples, the spiritual and scientific meaning hidden in ancient architecture, and the untold truths preserved through centuries of Indian civilization.
Why were erotic sculptures carved on temple walls? Were these sculptures connected to spirituality, tantra, human psychology, or ancient education systems? Dr. Emani Sivanagi Reddy explains the historical, cultural, and archaeological perspectives behind these mysterious temple carvings found across India. From Khajuraho-style symbolism to forgotten temple traditions, this conversation uncovers insights rarely discussed in mainstream media.
The discussion also explores the mystery of Varanasi, considered one of the oldest living cities on the planet. Discover the spiritual significance, ancient history, and archaeological importance of Kashi and why it remains a powerful center of Hindu civilization even today. This telugu podcast further investigates the Yaganti Nandi mystery and the belief that the Nandi idol continues to grow in size over time, attracting devotees and researchers alike.
Another major topic covered is the growing giripradakshina trend in Arunachalam and the spiritual importance of Arunachala temple. Learn why thousands of devotees perform girivalam and how ancient saints connected Arunachalam with cosmic energy and self-realization. Rohith Gollena and Dr. Emani Sivanagi Reddy also discuss the controversial Tejo Mahalaya theory and the ongoing debates surrounding the history of the Taj Mahal.
This episode of lazymuscle podcast also uncovers evidence and stories related to Indian culture in foreign countries, including traces of Sanatana Dharma, temple architecture, Hindu traditions, and ancient Indian influence found across Southeast Asia and other civilizations. The mystery of the Saraswati River is explored in detail, including archaeological findings, Vedic references, and scientific research that continue to fuel debates among historians and scholars.
The conversation takes an interesting turn into Vishnu bhakts vs Shiva bhakts, examining how different devotional traditions evolved within Hinduism while still sharing deep spiritual roots. The episode also covers the famous Karni Mata Temple, known worldwide as the rat temple, where thousands of rats are worshipped and protected as sacred beings according to ancient beliefs and local traditions.
One of the most mind-blowing segments focuses on the construction mystery of the Brihadeeswara Temple. How was such a massive temple built centuries ago without modern machinery? What engineering techniques were used to transport gigantic stones? Dr. Emani Sivanagi Reddy explains the brilliance of ancient Indian temple architecture, Chola engineering, and the scientific precision hidden within these monuments.
If you are interested in Indian archaeology, Hindu temple mysteries, ancient Indian history, spirituality, Sanatana Dharma, unexplained mysteries, Vedic science, temple architecture, or cultural debates, this RRRshow episode is packed with powerful insights and rare knowledge. This telugu podcast is a must-watch for history lovers, devotees, researchers, and anyone curious about India’s forgotten past.

item.title: 🚨 Watch till end #telugupodcast #rohithgollena #rrrshow
item.description:
In this fascinating telugu podcast episode, renowned archaeologist Dr. Emani Sivanagi Reddy joins Rohit Gollena from lazymuscle for an eye-opening conversation on the hidden history, temple mysteries, ancient Indian knowledge systems, and controversial topics that continue to fascinate millions. This episode of RRRshow dives deep into the secrets behind erotic sculptures on Indian temples, the spiritual and scientific meaning hidden in ancient architecture, and the untold truths preserved through centuries of Indian civilization.
Why were erotic sculptures carved on temple walls? Were these sculptures connected to spirituality, tantra, human psychology, or ancient education systems? Dr. Emani Sivanagi Reddy explains the historical, cultural, and archaeological perspectives behind these mysterious temple carvings found across India. From Khajuraho-style symbolism to forgotten temple traditions, this conversation uncovers insights rarely discussed in mainstream media.
The discussion also explores the mystery of Varanasi, considered one of the oldest living cities on the planet. Discover the spiritual significance, ancient history, and archaeological importance of Kashi and why it remains a powerful center of Hindu civilization even today. This telugu podcast further investigates the Yaganti Nandi mystery and the belief that the Nandi idol continues to grow in size over time, attracting devotees and researchers alike.
Another major topic covered is the growing giripradakshina trend in Arunachalam and the spiritual importance of Arunachala temple. Learn why thousands of devotees perform girivalam and how ancient saints connected Arunachalam with cosmic energy and self-realization. Rohith Gollena and Dr. Emani Sivanagi Reddy also discuss the controversial Tejo Mahalaya theory and the ongoing debates surrounding the history of the Taj Mahal.
This episode of lazymuscle podcast also uncovers evidence and stories related to Indian culture in foreign countries, including traces of Sanatana Dharma, temple architecture, Hindu traditions, and ancient Indian influence found across Southeast Asia and other civilizations. The mystery of the Saraswati River is explored in detail, including archaeological findings, Vedic references, and scientific research that continue to fuel debates among historians and scholars.
The conversation takes an interesting turn into Vishnu bhakts vs Shiva bhakts, examining how different devotional traditions evolved within Hinduism while still sharing deep spiritual roots. The episode also covers the famous Karni Mata Temple, known worldwide as the rat temple, where thousands of rats are worshipped and protected as sacred beings according to ancient beliefs and local traditions.
One of the most mind-blowing segments focuses on the construction mystery of the Brihadeeswara Temple. How was such a massive temple built centuries ago without modern machinery? What engineering techniques were used to transport gigantic stones? Dr. Emani Sivanagi Reddy explains the brilliance of ancient Indian temple architecture, Chola engineering, and the scientific precision hidden within these monuments.
If you are interested in Indian archaeology, Hindu temple mysteries, ancient Indian history, spirituality, Sanatana Dharma, unexplained mysteries, Vedic science, temple architecture, or cultural debates, this RRRshow episode is packed with powerful insights and rare knowledge. This telugu podcast is a must-watch for history lovers, devotees, researchers, and anyone curious about India’s forgotten past.
Watch this exclusive conversation with archaeologist Dr. Emani Sivanagi Reddy and host Rohit Gollena only on lazymuscle. Don’t forget to like, share, and subscribe for more deep conversations on Indian history, culture, spirituality, archaeology, and untold mysteries.

item.title: 🚨VIJAY vs STALIN SANATANA DHARMA TVK's FIRST CONTROVERSY | Att@ck on Hindu Sentiments | VR Raja
item.description:
🚨VIJAY vs STALIN SANATANA DHARMA TVK's FIRST CONTROVERSY | Att@ck on Hindu Sentiments | VR Raja
సనాతన ధర్మాన్ని నాశనం చేయాలి అన్న ఉదయనిధి కామెంట్స్ వెనుక ఉన్న అసలు నిజం ఏంటి? ముఖ్యమంత్రి దళపతి విజయ్ ఎందుకు సైలెంట్ గా ఉన్నారు?
For Business Inquiries & Brand Collaborations: 📧 vrfactsofficial1969@gmail.com
Ee video lo, Tamil Nadu politics ni shake chestunna "Sanatana Dharma" controversy gurinchi neutral ga matladukundam. Udhayanidhi Stalin and TVK MLAs assembly lo chesina hate speech comments asalu meaning ento, vaalla "Dondakaya Logic" ni Ambedkar and Periyar facts tho ela kottipareyacho detail ga analyse cheddam.
In this deep dive into the complex world of Dravidian politics and true secularism, we cover: 🔸 The Assembly Ruckus: Analyzing Udhayanidhi Stalin's repeated calls to "eradicate" Sanatana Dharma and the Supreme Court's definition of hate speech. 🔸 Breaking the Logic: Exposing the false narrative that Sanatana Dharma equals caste hierarchy, and how politicians use it for vote bank politics. 🔸 Ambedkar vs Periyar: The fundamental differences between the two leaders regarding democracy, Sanskrit, and Hindu concepts, proving that Ambedkar never called for eradication. 🔸 Vijay's Silence & Actions: Why TVK's CM Vijay remained silent during the assembly speech, his controversial appointment of an astrologer, and his bold initial governance steps like closing TASMAC shops. 🔸 Temple Gold Melting: The shocking reality of the Tamil Nadu government melting over 1000 kg of temple gold while thousands of temples remain closed for repairs. 🔸 The Floor Test & AIADMK Split: How Vijay cleverly secured his CM position by splitting the AIADMK and exposing Edappadi Palaniswami's alleged DMK alliance attempt.
Asalu ikkada nijamina secularism ekkada undi? Ee vote bank politics meeda mee opinion ento kinda comment cheyandi!
#VRRaja #SanatanaDharma #TamilNaduPolitics #UdhayanidhiStalin #ThalapathyVijay #TVKParty #PoliticalAnalysis

item.title: Nataraja Decoded: The Hidden Meaning of Shiva’s Cosmic Dance
item.description:
Have you ever stopped to ask what every part of Nataraja form actually means?
Why is God Shiva dancing? Why does He hold a drum in one hand and fire in another? Who is the small demon under His foot? And why is this form considered one of the deepest visual explanations of the universe?
In this video, we decode the full meaning of Nataraja, the cosmic dancing form of God Shiva.
From the story of the Tillai forest and the sages who forgot surrender, to the demon Apasmara who represents ignorance and forgetfulness, to the five cosmic actions of creation, preservation, destruction, concealment, and grace, every detail of Nataraja carries a profound meaning.
We also explore the Chidambaram connection, the Chidambara Rahasya, the empty space behind the curtain, the Chola bronze tradition, and why Nataraja became a global symbol of the cosmic dance.
This is not just a beautiful bronze figure.
It is philosophy. It is iconography. It is cosmology. It is the universe compressed into one divine form.
Watch till the end, because after this video, you will never look at Nataraja the same way again.
👇 Let us know in the comments: Which detail of Nataraja surprised you the most?
🕉️ Om Namah Shivaya
#Nataraja #Shiva #GodShiva #Chidambaram #NatarajaDecoded #IndianTemples #Hinduism #TempleGirl #ShivaTandava #SanatanaDharma

item.title: 🚨BREAKING XIN PING INSULTED TRUMP | US-China Summit Meeting Highlights | THUCYDIDES TRAP | VR Raja
item.description:
Apply for STRIDE school of Business and AI Test (S-BAT ) Now : https://bit.ly/4dcriiv
STRIDE School of Business offers a 3-year BBA degree through AICTE-approved campuses, built for how companies operate today. AI is integrated into every subject, with a strong focus on real work and execution.
At Stride School of Business, you learn by doing—working on real projects, solving business problems, and building a strong portfolio from Day 1.
🚨BREAKING XIN PING INSULTED TRUMP | US-China Summit Meeting Highlights | THUCYDIDES TRAP | VR Raja
చైనా ట్రిప్ లో ట్రంప్ కి ఘోర అవమానం! తూసిడైడ్స్ ట్రాప్ (Thucydides Trap) అంటే ఏంటి? అమెరికా సూపర్ పవర్ స్టేటస్ నిజంగానే పడిపోతోందా?
For Business Inquiries & Brand Collaborations: 📧 vrfactsofficial1969@gmail.com
Ee video lo, US President Donald Trump recent ga China ki vellina 2-day visit gurinchi detailed ga analyse cheddam. Xi Jinping ee meeting lo Trump ni ela dominate chesadu? Asalu "Thucydides Trap" ane word vaadi America moham meedane Xi elanti warning ichadu? Elon Musk, Tim Cook lanti top CEOs Trump tho paatu China ki enduku vellaru?
In this deep dive into the high-stakes US-China geopolitical summit, we cover: 🔸 The Thucydides Trap: Understanding the ancient Greek history of Sparta and Athens, and why 75% of power shifts end in war. 🔸 Xi's Brutal Warning: How China indirectly called the US a "declining nation" and warned of conflicts over the Taiwan issue. 🔸 The Corporate Invasion: Why the CEOs of Tesla, Apple, and Nvidia are desperate for the Chinese market despite heavy restrictions. 🔸 The AI Dominance: How China is winning the global AI race with 50% of new patents and why US tech giants need their clearance. 🔸 The Iran Mediation: The only major progress from the summit: China's interest in ending the Middle East war to secure its oil supply through the Strait of Hormuz. 🔸 Impact on India: What this lack of trade deals means for India's economy, tariffs, and our potential to grow in the tech sector.
Asalu Trump China visit success aa leka utter flop aa? Ee Thucydides trap gurinchi mee opinion ento kinda comment cheyandi!

item.title: The 7 LEVELS Of Cloud DevOps [In 20 Minutes]
item.description:
Level-Wise Learning Resources: https://gdocs.openinapp.co/hwavr
Case Studies: https://www.linkedin.com/posts/vsadhwani_here-are-15-real-world-case-studies-every-share-7413535285701091328-hvEP/
https://www.linkedin.com/posts/vsadhwani_5-case-studies-you-must-read-if-youre-preparing-share-7395883296125005825-iJuq/
In this video, I’ll break down the 7 distinct levels of modern DevOps careers, from entry-level engineers to AI infrastructure and leadership roles.
I’ve covered the skills required at each level, the certifications actually worth pursuing, salary ranges, day-to-day responsibilities, and how expectations evolve as you move from automation and cloud operations into Kubernetes, platform engineering, distributed systems, AIOps, and production AI deployments.
If you’re a student, software engineer, cloud engineer, DevOps engineer, SRE, or someone transitioning into AI infrastructure and platform roles, this video will help you identify your current level and understand exactly what you need to focus on next.
CHAPTERS: 00:00 Intro 00:37 Level 1 04:40 Level 2 07:15 Level 3 09:44 Level 4 11:40 Level 5 13:31 Level 6 15:20 Level 7 16:46 Conclusion
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/vishakha.sadhwani LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/vsadhwani/
Subscribe to my Newsletter: https://www.tech5ense.com/
-----------------------------------------------
🙋‍♀️ ABOUT ME
I’m Vishakha ☁️; A Cloud Architect and DevOps enthusiast who loves turning complex cloud concepts into simple, practical insights you can actually use. You’ll find real-world projects 💻 quick explainers ☕ and honest career advice 💬; From Kubernetes and Terraform to landing roles and building your tech brand, I keep things approachable, actionable, and a little fun so learning Cloud and DevOps actually feels exciting.
If this sounds like your vibe, hit subscribe, and let’s keep growing together 🚀

item.title: 5 Database Types EXPLAINED (For Software Engineer Interviews)
item.description:
Vishakha Sadhwani: 5 Database Types EXPLAINED (For Software Engineer Interviews)
The database you choose depends on 2 things: → What your data looks like → How you want to query it
Here are the 5 types that actually matter 👇
1. SQL (Structured + Consistent) Tables, rows, transactions → Best for user data, payments, anything that must be correct
2. NoSQL (Flexible + Scalable) Documents, key-value, massive scale → Best for feeds, chats, logs, large unstructured data
3. Graph DB (Relationships) Nodes + edges → Best for recommendations, “people you may know”, connections
4. Time-Series DB (Data over time) Timestamped events → Best for analytics, monitoring, system metrics
5. Vector DB (AI-native) Embeddings + similarity search → Best for recommendations, semantic search, RAG systems
Different databases solve different problems.
Subscribe for more such breakdowns!

item.title: 🚨NEET 2026 - BIG SCAM 😨 | Cancelled 🤯| What Exactly Happened ?🤔| Aye Jude ✊
item.description:
Join this channel to get access to perks: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCq9kaXFyF2b6oXQ5veWdvog/join
BUSINESS ENQUIRIES- Contact 📧 info@ayejude.com
In this video, Aye Jude explains the controversy surrounding the NEET Exam after reports of a question paper leak in Rajasthan. Authorities are now considering a re-exam for nearly 23 lakh students, saying mistakes from previous years should not be repeated. The video also mentions that a similar controversy had occurred in 2024, raising concerns about exam security and transparency. According to reports, a father from Sikar received a document containing around 400 questions and later found that many of them matched the actual NEET paper. After noticing the similarities, he reportedly filed a complaint with the police, leading to an investigation. Officials from the National Testing Agency have assured students that future exams will be conducted responsibly and fairly. With millions of students waiting anxiously, will the investigation restore trust or create even more uncertainty around NEET?

item.title: Vivo X300 Ultra Camera Beast 🔥📸 #VivoX300Ultra #Vivo #CameraBeast #CameraPhone #zeiss #trending
🚨 Watch till end #telugupodcast #rohithgollena #rrrshow
item.description:
In this powerful episode of the RRRshow, host Rohith Gollena (LazyMuscle) sits down with Major SPS Oberoi, a decorated ex-Army officer known for his discipline, courage, and deep insights into India’s security and history. This Telugu podcast offers a rare and authentic perspective on the untold stories behind India’s wars, intelligence operations, and geopolitical relations that shaped the nation’s destiny. Through gripping storytelling and factual clarity, Major Oberoi walks us through India’s most defining moments — from the chaos of Direct Action Day in Calcutta to the heroic tales from the 1971 India-Pakistan War. He unveils how America’s role in that war affected India’s global standing and how strong alliances like India and Russia’s friendship became crucial for India’s defense and development. This episode also explores India’s long-standing ties with Afghanistan, revealing lesser-known details of cooperation and intelligence exchanges that influenced the region’s stability. The conversation takes a deeper turn as Major Oberoi shares the extraordinary work of Ajit Doval, often referred to as India’s James Bond, and the brilliance behind India’s covert spy network and its training. For those fascinated by defense strategy, espionage, and patriotism, this RRRshow Telugu podcast offers an in-depth look into how India’s intelligence and armed forces operate silently yet powerfully to protect national interests. Rohith Gollena (LazyMuscle) ensures the conversation remains engaging and educational as they discuss how India has evolved into a global superpower, driven by strategic foresight, leadership, and the sacrifices of its unsung heroes. The episode also dives into historical realities that shaped modern India — the true reasons behind how the British left India, the contributions of leaders like Subhash Chandra Bose, Dr. B.R. Ambedkar, Bhagat Singh, and Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel, and how their visions collectively led India toward freedom and unity. Major Oberoi also shares his experiences and personal reflections on leadership, motivation, and discipline, giving practical advice for today’s youth. His insights on how to prepare for competitive exams and develop a soldier’s mindset are both inspiring and actionable. As the conversation moves toward the end, he opens up about the best advice he ever received during his service — a lesson in humility, integrity, and resilience that continues to guide his life even today. This LazyMuscle podcast episode is more than just an interview — it’s a masterclass in history, leadership, and national pride. Through every segment, listeners gain a deeper understanding of what it means to serve the nation and how values like discipline and strategy extend beyond the battlefield into everyday life. For Telugu-speaking audiences passionate about India’s history, defense, and world relations, this episode offers an unparalleled experience. It blends raw patriotism with wisdom and storytelling that only someone like Major SPS Oberoi can deliver. From the tales of wartime bravery to the secret workings of India’s intelligence agencies, and from historical revelations to practical life lessons, this episode is a reminder that the story of India is not just about the past — it’s about the spirit that continues to define our future. Watch till the end to hear Major Oberoi’s final advice to viewers — a powerful message that every Indian must listen to.

In this video, Aye Jude explains the recent speech by Narendra Modi in Hyderabad, which sparked strong reactions among the public. During the speech, Modi reportedly urged citizens to make temporary compromises for the country’s economic stability. He advised people to reduce unnecessary travel, cut down petrol consumption, and prefer work-from-home options wherever possible. The speech also included suggestions to avoid luxury spending such as buying gold for a year and reducing dependence on foreign goods and international travel. Modi further stressed that India should learn from past economic and strategic mistakes and avoid repeating them in the future. item.title: The Untold Side of Human Survival 💔 #telugupodcast #rohithgollena #socialjustice
item.description:
In this emotional and thought-provoking episode of the telugu podcast by lazymuscle and RRRshow, host rohith gollena sits down with renowned social activist Sunitha Krishnan to discuss the hidden emotional struggles faced by women trapped inside dark and exploitative environments. This conversation goes beyond public perception and reveals the psychological pain, fear, loneliness, and discomfort many individuals silently carry throughout their lives. Through real experiences and deep social insights, this episode encourages viewers to understand the human side of stories society often ignores.
This telugu podcast explores how emotional trauma, manipulation, survival pressure, social stigma, and fear affect the mental health and daily lives of vulnerable women living in difficult conditions. Sunitha Krishnan explains how many people are forced into situations where they lose freedom, confidence, identity, and emotional safety. The discussion also highlights how society frequently judges people without understanding the circumstances, abuse, or emotional suffering behind their reality.
Throughout this impactful conversation, rohith gollena asks important questions about emotional healing, social rejection, mental trauma, and the long-term psychological effects caused by exploitation and unsafe environments. The episode examines how silence, fear, and lack of support systems continue to affect countless lives even after escape or rehabilitation. These insights make the discussion highly relevant for youth, parents, students, educators, and viewers interested in social awareness content.
Unlike regular interview content, this episode of lazymuscle and RRRshow focuses on empathy, awareness, and understanding the emotional realities hidden beneath society’s surface. Sunitha Krishnan shares powerful observations from years of rescue work, rehabilitation efforts, and direct interaction with survivors. Her perspective gives listeners a rare understanding of the emotional battles many people fight silently every day.
This episode also discusses how awareness, compassion, education, and responsible conversations can help create safer environments for vulnerable individuals. The podcast encourages viewers to stop looking at these issues only through judgment and instead understand the emotional, psychological, and social realities connected to them. It is a conversation designed not just to inform but to emotionally move the audience toward empathy and awareness.
If you enjoy meaningful long-form conversations, emotional storytelling, social reality podcasts, psychological discussions, and awareness-driven content, this episode will deeply impact your perspective. Watch this powerful conversation featuring Sunitha Krishnan and rohith gollena to understand the emotional side of lives society rarely talks about openly.

item.title: 🚨 Mystery No one talks about | Dr.Sunitha Krishnan | Rohith Gollena #telugupodcast
item.description:
Why do certain disturbing psychological conditions exist, and what does science actually say about them? In this thought-provoking episode of the RRRshow by lazymuscle, host Rohith Gollena sits down with Sunitha Krishnan to unpack one of society’s most difficult and uncomfortable subjects — the psychology behind pedophilic behavior, the myths surrounding it, the warning signs, and the urgent need for awareness, prevention, and responsible conversations. This telugu podcast takes a research-driven approach to understanding the psychological condition without sensationalism, focusing instead on education, societal responsibility, and child safety.
Many people misunderstand the difference between criminal behavior, psychological disorders, and preventive intervention. Through this powerful discussion, Sunitha Krishnan shares critical insights into how such conditions are viewed from psychological, social, and legal perspectives. The conversation explores why silence around these issues often increases danger, how communities can become more aware, and why open dialogue is essential for protecting vulnerable children. For anyone interested in psychology, human behavior analysis, mental health awareness, and child protection, this episode delivers valuable perspective in a way that is accessible for Telugu-speaking audiences.
This episode of the telugu podcast also addresses the role of family systems, social stigma, behavioral patterns, trauma, and the importance of early intervention. Instead of relying on assumptions or fear-based narratives, the discussion encourages listeners to examine evidence-based psychological frameworks that explain deviant behavior patterns. Sunitha Krishnan’s experience working with vulnerable communities brings depth to the conversation, while Rohith Gollena ensures the discussion remains practical, relevant, and understandable for everyday listeners.
The RRRshow by lazymuscle continues to bring conversations that challenge conventional thinking and push listeners toward awareness and action. From social justice issues to psychological realities that society often avoids discussing, this podcast aims to create informed Telugu content that sparks meaningful reflection. If you are someone who values deep conversations, educational storytelling, and discussions that address real societal concerns, this episode is essential viewing.
This episode is especially relevant for parents, educators, students of psychology, social workers, and anyone interested in understanding the hidden complexities of human behavior. By bringing these difficult conversations into the public domain, rohith gollena and lazymuscle create space for awareness, prevention, and informed action. Watch this telugu podcast till the end to gain deeper insights into one of the most sensitive yet important psychological discussions of our time.
If you value impactful Telugu conversations around psychology, mental health, social awareness, and truth-driven dialogue, subscribe to lazymuscle and stay tuned to the RRRshow for more conversations that matter.

item.description:
Why do certain disturbing psychological conditions exist, and what does science actually say about them? In this thought-provoking episode of the RRRshow by lazymuscle, host Rohith Gollena sits down with Sunitha Krishnan to unpack one of society’s most difficult and uncomfortable subjects — the psychology behind pedophilic behavior, the myths surrounding it, the warning signs, and the urgent need for awareness, prevention, and responsible conversations. This telugu podcast takes a research-driven approach to understanding the psychological condition without sensationalism, focusing instead on education, societal responsibility, and child safety.
Many people misunderstand the difference between criminal behavior, psychological disorders, and preventive intervention. Through this powerful discussion, Sunitha Krishnan shares critical insights into how such conditions are viewed from psychological, social, and legal perspectives. The conversation explores why silence around these issues often increases danger, how communities can become more aware, and why open dialogue is essential for protecting vulnerable children. For anyone interested in psychology, human behavior analysis, mental health awareness, and child protection, this episode delivers valuable perspective in a way that is accessible for Telugu-speaking audiences.
This episode of the telugu podcast also addresses the role of family systems, social stigma, behavioral patterns, trauma, and the importance of early intervention. Instead of relying on assumptions or fear-based narratives, the discussion encourages listeners to examine evidence-based psychological frameworks that explain deviant behavior patterns. Sunitha Krishnan’s experience working with vulnerable communities brings depth to the conversation, while Rohith Gollena ensures the discussion remains practical, relevant, and understandable for everyday listeners.
The RRRshow by lazymuscle continues to bring conversations that challenge conventional thinking and push listeners toward awareness and action. From social justice issues to psychological realities that society often avoids discussing, this podcast aims to create informed Telugu content that sparks meaningful reflection. If you are someone who values deep conversations, educational storytelling, and discussions that address real societal concerns, this episode is essential viewing.
This episode is especially relevant for parents, educators, students of psychology, social workers, and anyone interested in understanding the hidden complexities of human behavior. By bringing these difficult conversations into the public domain, rohith gollena and lazymuscle create space for awareness, prevention, and informed action. Watch this telugu podcast till the end to gain deeper insights into one of the most sensitive yet important psychological discussions of our time.
If you value impactful Telugu conversations around psychology, mental health, social awareness, and truth-driven dialogue, subscribe to lazymuscle and stay tuned to the RRRshow for more conversations that matter.
#telugupodcast #lazymuscles #rrrshow #rohithgollena #sunithakrishnan #psychologypodcast #mentalhealthtelugu #childprotection #socialawareness #humanbehavior #telugucreator #educationalpodcast #deeptalks #awarenessmatters #telugucontentcreator

item.title: 🚨 Dark Reality No One Talks About | Dr.Sunitha Krishnan | Rohith Gollena #telugupodcast
item.description:
Why do certain disturbing psychological conditions exist, and what does science actually say about them? In this thought-provoking episode of the RRRshow by lazymuscle, host Rohith Gollena sits down with Sunitha Krishnan to unpack one of society’s most difficult and uncomfortable subjects — the psychology behind pedophilic behavior, the myths surrounding it, the warning signs, and the urgent need for awareness, prevention, and responsible conversations. This telugu podcast takes a research-driven approach to understanding the psychological condition without sensationalism, focusing instead on education, societal responsibility, and child safety.
Many people misunderstand the difference between criminal behavior, psychological disorders, and preventive intervention. Through this powerful discussion, Sunitha Krishnan shares critical insights into how such conditions are viewed from psychological, social, and legal perspectives. The conversation explores why silence around these issues often increases danger, how communities can become more aware, and why open dialogue is essential for protecting vulnerable children. For anyone interested in psychology, human behavior analysis, mental health awareness, and child protection, this episode delivers valuable perspective in a way that is accessible for Telugu-speaking audiences.
This episode of the telugu podcast also addresses the role of family systems, social stigma, behavioral patterns, trauma, and the importance of early intervention. Instead of relying on assumptions or fear-based narratives, the discussion encourages listeners to examine evidence-based psychological frameworks that explain deviant behavior patterns. Sunitha Krishnan’s experience working with vulnerable communities brings depth to the conversation, while Rohith Gollena ensures the discussion remains practical, relevant, and understandable for everyday listeners.
The RRRshow by lazymuscle continues to bring conversations that challenge conventional thinking and push listeners toward awareness and action. From social justice issues to psychological realities that society often avoids discussing, this podcast aims to create informed Telugu content that sparks meaningful reflection. If you are someone who values deep conversations, educational storytelling, and discussions that address real societal concerns, this episode is essential viewing.
This episode is especially relevant for parents, educators, students of psychology, social workers, and anyone interested in understanding the hidden complexities of human behavior. By bringing these difficult conversations into the public domain, rohith gollena and lazymuscle create space for awareness, prevention, and informed action. Watch this telugu podcast till the end to gain deeper insights into one of the most sensitive yet important psychological discussions of our time.
If you value impactful Telugu conversations around psychology, mental health, social awareness, and truth-driven dialogue, subscribe to lazymuscle and stay tuned to the RRRshow for more conversations that matter.
#telugupodcast #lazymuscles #rrrshow #rohithgollena #sunithakrishnan #psychologypodcast #mentalhealthtelugu #childprotection #socialawareness #humanbehavior #telugucreator #educationalpodcast #deeptalks #awarenessmatters #telugucontentcreator

item.title: This is how God Krishna came to Vrindavan #krishna #vrindavan #bankebihari
IMPORTANT DevOps Interview Question! Batch Vs. Streaming In Data Processing
item.description:
Vishakha Sadhwani: IMPORTANT DevOps Interview Question! Batch Vs. Streaming In Data Processing
In this short, I’ll break down the difference between batch processing and streaming using a simple Parle-G biscuit analogy.
I’ve covered how batch systems process stored data together, how streaming systems handle data in real time, and where both concepts are used in DevOps, cloud, and AI systems.
If you’re preparing for backend, DevOps, data engineering, or AI interviews, this concept is something you’ll definitely come across.
Leave a like, share, and subscribe for more such breakdowns!

You’ll find real-world projects 💻 quick explainers ☕ and honest career advice 💬; From Kubernetes and Terraform to landing roles and building your tech brand, I keep things approachable, actionable, and a little fun so learning Cloud and DevOps actually feels exciting.

What is your take on the DMK-AIADMK secret alliance rumors? Vijay ki chances unnaya? Let me know in the comments!

item.title: Edge Stores Passwords in Plain Text

item.title: Hats off to your dedication 🙌. #telugupodcast #rohithgollena #rrrshow
item.description:
Why do certain disturbing psychological conditions exist, and what does science actually say about them? In this thought-provoking episode of the RRRshow by lazymuscle, host Rohith Gollena sits down with Sunitha Krishnan to unpack one of society’s most difficult and uncomfortable subjects — the psychology behind pedophilic behavior, the myths surrounding it, the warning signs, and the urgent need for awareness, prevention, and responsible conversations. This telugu podcast takes a research-driven approach to understanding the psychological condition without sensationalism, focusing instead on education, societal responsibility, and child safety.
Many people misunderstand the difference between criminal behavior, psychological disorders, and preventive intervention. Through this powerful discussion, Sunitha Krishnan shares critical insights into how such conditions are viewed from psychological, social, and legal perspectives. The conversation explores why silence around these issues often increases danger, how communities can become more aware, and why open dialogue is essential for protecting vulnerable children. For anyone interested in psychology, human behavior analysis, mental health awareness, and child protection, this episode delivers valuable perspective in a way that is accessible for Telugu-speaking audiences.
This episode of the telugu podcast also addresses the role of family systems, social stigma, behavioral patterns, trauma, and the importance of early intervention. Instead of relying on assumptions or fear-based narratives, the discussion encourages listeners to examine evidence-based psychological frameworks that explain deviant behavior patterns. Sunitha Krishnan’s experience working with vulnerable communities brings depth to the conversation, while Rohith Gollena ensures the discussion remains practical, relevant, and understandable for everyday listeners.
The RRRshow by lazymuscle continues to bring conversations that challenge conventional thinking and push listeners toward awareness and action. From social justice issues to psychological realities that society often avoids discussing, this podcast aims to create informed Telugu content that sparks meaningful reflection. If you are someone who values deep conversations, educational storytelling, and discussions that address real societal concerns, this episode is essential viewing.
This episode is especially relevant for parents, educators, students of psychology, social workers, and anyone interested in understanding the hidden complexities of human behavior. By bringing these difficult conversations into the public domain, rohith gollena and lazymuscle create space for awareness, prevention, and informed action. Watch this telugu podcast till the end to gain deeper insights into one of the most sensitive yet important psychological discussions of our time.
If you value impactful Telugu conversations around psychology, mental health, social awareness, and truth-driven dialogue, subscribe to lazymuscle and stay tuned to the RRRshow for more conversations that matter.

item.title: Claude Code EXPLAINED In 2 MINUTES!
item.description:
Vishakha Sadhwani: Claude Code EXPLAINED In 2 MINUTES!
If I had to explain this properly, I’d break Claude Code down into these 4 layers:
Skills - Reusable instruction files Teach Claude how to perform specific tasks once, and reuse forever
CLAUDE.md - Your project memory Defines your stack, rules, and conventions so Claude doesn’t “forget” every session
MCP (Model Context Protocol) - Tool access layer Connects Claude to GitHub, Terraform, APIs so it can actually execute, not just suggest
Agent Mode - Autonomy layer Claude writes → runs → debugs → repeats… without waiting for you
Start thinking in systems, not prompts. ⚠️ But remember: Claude can still be confidently wrong. So, always review.
Subscribe for more such breakdowns!

item.title: The Origin of Mahakaleshwar Jyotirlinga | Ujjain’s Powerful Shiva Temple
item.description:
Why is Shiva called Mahakal? Why does Mahakaleshwar Jyotirlinga face south, the direction of Yama? And why does the first ritual of the day begin with ash?
In this video, Temple Girl takes you into the origin story of Mahakaleshwar Jyotirlinga, the story of the demon Dushana, the devotion of Vedapriya and his sons, and the moment Shiva appeared in Ujjain as Mahakal, the great conqueror of time.
Ujjain was not just an ancient city. It was once the center from which Indian astronomers measured time. And at the heart of this city sits Mahakal, the form of Shiva who does not just mark time, but becomes time itself.
From the legend of Mahakal’s appearance to the mystery of the Bhasma Aarti, this is the story behind Ujjain’s most powerful Shiva temple.
👇 Have you visited Mahakaleshwar Jyotirlinga in Ujjain? Share your experience in the comments.
If you enjoyed watching this video, subscribe to Temple Girl. We have the stories of all twelve Jyotirlingas coming.
#Mahakaleshwar #Mahakal #Ujjain #MahakaleshwarTemple #Jyotirlinga #BhasmaAarti #KaalBhairav #IndianMystery #HinduMystery #AncientIndia #SpiritualDocumentary #TimeMystery #EnergyVortex #HinduTemples #MahakalEnergy #ShivaMystery #AncientTemples #MysteryDocumentary

item.title: SENIOR AI Engineer Tech Stack [2026]
item.description:
Vishakha Sadhwani: SENIOR AI Engineer Tech Stack [2026]
Learning Resources: https://gdrive.openinapp.co/v2gcw
AI systems don’t run on models alone.
→ How do you deploy models on GPUs? → How do you scale inference across clusters? → How do you automate infra without breaking production?
The gap isn’t AI knowledge. It’s infrastructure understanding.
And these are the tools that actually bridge that gap 👇
1. Kubernetes (The Foundation) The operating system of modern AI. Runs your models, manages GPU clusters, keeps systems scalable.
2. Helm + Argo CD (The Pipeline) The GitOps standard. Automates deployments and keeps your infra in sync with code.
3. Claude Code (The Workflow) AI inside your terminal. Helps you debug, architect, and move faster. If you want to become an AI Solutions Architect, This is the stack that actually matters.
If you build strength here, you position yourself for cloud, platform, and AI infrastructure roles.

item.title: FULL AIOps Project [Step-By-Step] | DevOps Hands-On Project Demo | Part 4 | Vishakha Sadhwani
item.description:
Check out UptimeRobot: https://uptimerobot.com/vishakha Use code "Vishakha" at checkout to get 10% off any paid plan.
GitHub Repo: https://github.com/vishakhasadhwani/devops-ai-playbook
Complete Playlist: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLXkUFcIv0_b7rzZe0o_2-GOS2qn5-0OQy
This is Part 4 of my complete DevOps + AIOps end-to-end project series, where I’ll show you how to add an AI layer to your DevOps system and build a real AIOps assistant.
I’ve covered how to build an AI agent using AWS Bedrock, integrate it with Lambda functions for logs, metrics, and health checks, connect CloudWatch and Prometheus data, and create a chat-based interface using Streamlit to troubleshoot production issues in real time.
Watch till the end to see how an AI assistant can analyze your system, detect issues, and suggest fixes automatically.
Also, check out the previous parts of this DevOps project series if you haven't already!
CHAPTERS: 00:00 Intro 01:27 Essential Concepts 04:01 Cloud Services Overview 06:30 AIOps Architecture Walkthrough 10:44 Fluent Bit Setup (Logs to CloudWatch) 13:57 Lambda Functions Setup (Logs, Metrics, Health) 23:29 Bedrock Agent Setup 29:01 Deployment Script (deploy.sh) 33:04 Testing the AI Agent 34:32 Streamlit UI Setup 37:33 Live Demo (AIOps in Action) 40:40 Recap

item.title: 3 Types of CI/CD Pipelines EXPLAINED | What Is CI/CD Pipeline?
item.description:
In this short, I’ll break down the three most important deployment pipelines every DevOps, Cloud, or MLOps engineer should understand: Traditional CI/CD, GitOps, and MLOps pipelines.
I’ve explained how push-based CI/CD works, how GitOps uses Git as the source of truth with tools like Argo CD, and how MLOps pipelines validate data, retrain models, benchmark performance, and safely deploy AI systems.
Master all three if you want to stay relevant in this Cloud/AI era.

item.title: We are at one of the most incredible shiva temples near Mangalore. #shiva #mahadev #temple
COMPLETE DevOps Project Hands-On Demo | Part 3 | Vishakha Sadhwani
item.description:
GitHub Repo: https://github.com/vishakhasadhwani/devops-ai-playbook
Complete Playlist: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLXkUFcIv0_b7rzZe0o_2-GOS2qn5-0OQy
This is Part 3 of my complete DevOps + AI end-to-end project series, where I’ll walk you through the real implementation phase as we start building and deploying our microservices-based application using modern DevOps tools.
I’ve covered how to run the project locally with Docker Compose, provision AWS infrastructure using Terraform, trigger CI pipelines with GitHub Actions, sync deployments using Argo CD, and set up an observability stack for monitoring. Also, I’ve shown how Claude Code can support modern DevOps workflows using AI tools.
This video is ideal for DevOps engineers, cloud learners, backend developers, and anyone who wants real hands-on project experience.
Watch till the end and stay tuned for Part 4, where I’ll walk you through AIOps in practice.

item.title: The Real Story of Kedarnath | Why Shiva Hid From the Pandavas | Char Dham Yatra
item.description:
Millions visit Kedarnath every year. But very few know the real reason why this temple exists.
Why did Shiva leave Kashi? Why did he refuse to meet the Pandavas? And why is the sacred form at Kedarnath not a traditional Shivling—but something far more unusual?
This is not just another temple story. This is the moment when Shiva chose to hide.
After the Kurukshetra war, the Pandavas were not victorious. They were broken. Burdened by the weight of their actions—killing their own family, their teachers, their blood. No yagna, no ritual could cleanse that.
There was only one path left. They had to find Shiva.
But Shiva did not want to be found.
He left Kashi. He disappeared into the Himalayas. He took the form of a bull and hid among ordinary cattle.
What followed was one of the most powerful and cinematic moments in our entire tradition— a chase, a divine refusal, and finally… a moment where Shiva stopped running.
And that exact moment is what you touch inside Kedarnath today.
In this video, we break down the complete story of Kedarnath— from the aftermath of the Mahabharata to the origin of the Panch Kedar temples, and the deeper meaning behind why this place continues to draw millions of devotees even today.
If you are planning a Kedarnath Yatra, or if you’ve already been there, this story will completely change how you see that temple.
👇 Tell us in the comments: Have you visited Kedarnath? What did you feel when you stood inside the temple?
🙏 Share this video with someone planning a Kedarnath trip this season.
🔔 Follow Temple Girl for more untold stories of temples, rituals, and Hindu traditions.
#Kedarnath #KedarnathTemple #Mahadev #Shiva #Pandavas #Mahabharata #PanchKedar #TempleStories #Hinduism #SpiritualIndia #KedarnathYatra #CharDham #IncredibleIndia

item.title: The Testaments
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: The Testaments.

The Testaments is based on Margaret Atwood's Booker Prize-winning novel of the same name, which was published in 2019 and takes place in the dystopian theocracy of Gilead. Years after the events of The Handmaid's Tale, The Testaments is a coming of age story that finds a new generation of young women in Gilead grappling with the bleak future that awaits them. For these young women, growing up in Gilead is all they have ever known, having no tangible memories of the outside world prior to their indoctrination into this life. Facing the prospect of being married off and living a life of servitude, they will be forced to search for allies, both new and old, to help in their fight for freedom and the life they deserve.

item.title: What Really happens inside Puri Jagannath in 24 Hours | The Untold Daily Routine of Puri Jagannath
item.description:
Millions visit Jagannath Temple every year, but very few know what actually happens inside once the doors close. Puri isn’t just a temple. It functions like a living household — with a precise, centuries-old daily routine built around caring for God. In this video, we take you through the complete 24-hour cycle inside Puri Jagannath. From the moment the seal on the temple doors is checked before dawn… to the first light that wakes Him… to the largest temple kitchen in the world preparing His meals… to the night rituals where He is dressed, comforted, and finally put to sleep. You’ll see why Jagannath is never directly bathed, how food becomes Mahaprasad only after a sacred transformation, and the powerful story that ensures no one is ever denied a meal here — even today. 👇 Let us know in the comments: Have you ever experienced Puri Jagannath? What stayed with you the most? ✈️ Know someone planning a trip to Puri soon? Share this video with them before they go!
#puri #purijagannath #vishnu

item.title: KILL PANDYAA 🔥🔥🔥💯
item.description:
#shorts #ytshorts #incogshorts #playlikeincognito #youtubeshorts
👉 DESCRIPTION: This video is made purely for fun and entertainment. In this Telugu roast, we take a light-hearted look at the Instagram personality known as Jr Sai Pallavi. The intention of this video is not to spread hate or target anyone personally.
The first half of the video is just a fun roast, but the real point of the video comes in the second half. On Instagram, many innocent creators post reels and receive negative comments. Instead of ignoring them, some people start making angry response reels and shouting at the audience, which only creates more negativity and drama.
The message here is simple: not every comment deserves a reaction. Sometimes the best thing to do is ignore the noise and keep doing your thing.
Watch till the end and let me know what you think in the comments.
If you enjoyed the video, like, share and subscribe for more funny content and Telugu roasts.

item.title: The ONLY video you need to complete Char Dham Yatra 2026 successfully | Kedarnath, Badrinath
item.description:
Planning the Char Dham Yatra in 2026? This is the only video you will need to complete the circuit successfully. If you are preparing for the spiritual journey of a lifetime to Yamunotri, Gangotri, Kedarnath, and Badrinath, you must know that the rules on the ground have drastically changed this season.
#kedarnath #badrinath #chardhamyatra
Welcome back to the Temple Girl channel. In this comprehensive, no-nonsense 2026 masterclass, we cover absolutely everything you need to successfully navigate the high Himalayas. We are breaking down the confirmed 2026 opening dates, the mandatory new registration system, how to get there, where to stay, and the exact reality of the grueling 16-kilometre Kedarnath trek. We are also diving deep into the strict mobile phone ban now in effect across all four temples, ticketed puja bookings, what most guides completely miss, and the insider survival rules that outdated itineraries will not tell you. Whether you are a budget pilgrim or looking for a more comfortable journey, this guide is built for you to survive, prepare properly, and experience the divine presence at these sacred sites without making costly mistakes.
🚨 **URGENT 2026 RULE CHANGES & UPDATES** 🚨 Registration is now your absolute first step. Before you book a hotel, transport, or flight, you must register. It is a legal requirement, it is completely free, and your Yatra Registration Letter QR code will be scanned at every single checkpoint and temple gate. Without it, you cannot enter any of the four Dhams.
🗺️ **THE 11-DAY MASTER CIRCUIT BREAKDOWN** 🗺️ The standard circuit takes 10 to 11 days, moving clockwise through two river valleys: the Yamuna and Bhagirathi in the first half, the Mandakini and Alaknanda in the second. * **Stop 1: Yamunotri:** Your base is Barkot, and the steep 6km trek starts from Janki Chatti. Do not forget to visit the Surya Kund, the natural hot spring beside the temple where pilgrims cook rice and potatoes as Prasad. * **Stop 2: Gangotri:** Your base is Uttarkashi. This is physically the easiest Dham. Make sure you stop at the Bhagirath Shila, the flat rock where King Bhagirath meditated, and stay for the intimate evening Ganga Aarti. * **The Long Drive & Panch Prayag:** The transfer from Gangotri to Guptkashi is 220km and takes 9-10 hours. Keep your eyes open on this drive! You will pass Devprayag (where the Alaknanda meets the Bhagirathi and becomes the Ganga) and Rudraprayag. Take Day 6 as a mandatory full rest day in Guptkashi to acclimatize before heading higher. * **Stop 3: Kedarnath:** The most demanding Dham. The 16km trek starts from Gaurikund. Never do this as a same-day return. Book an overnight stay so you can actually experience the darshan. Do not miss Bhairavnath (the guardian deity of Kedarnath just 1km above the main temple) and Triyuginarayan (where Shiva and Parvati married) on your way back. * **Stop 4: Badrinath:** Your base is Joshimath. Before darshan, physically reset by bathing in the Tapt Kund thermal spring. You must arrive by 11 AM for the morning session, and remember the golden mountain rule: finish your darshan and be off the mountain by noon before the weather turns. * **The Return:** Stop at the Dhari Devi temple—the guardian deity of Uttarakhand—on your return journey to Haridwar. Local tradition dictates the Yatra is incomplete without her darshan.
🎒 **MEDICAL, SURVIVAL & PACKING SECRETS** 🎒 Your body needs preparation. Start preparing at least one month before with 5km daily walks, squats, and pranayama. Avoid alcohol and smoking completely from Haridwar onwards. At 11,755 feet in Kedarnath, oxygen is roughly 40% lower. You must carry a dedicated medical kit including a portable oxygen canister, Diamox (start 24 hours before the trek), ORS, and glucose tablets. Dress in at least three layers, as Kedarnath hits zero degrees at night even in June. Bring shoes with proper grip and a walking stick to navigate narrow paths shared with mules. Cash rules on this circuit. Bring ₹12,000 to ₹15,000 minimum in small denominations because UPI fails roughly 70% of the time at high-altitude base camps. Finally, avoid oily food like parathas on winding mountain roads to prevent severe nausea; stick to saatvik Pahari cooking like Mandua ki roti, Aloo ki Thechwani, and dry fruits.
⏱️ **VIDEO CHAPTERS** ⏱️ 00:00 - The ONLY 2026 Guide You Need 01:15 - Step 1: Mandatory Registration & 2026 Rules 02:30 - e-Swasthya Dham & New Medical Checks 03:45 - When to Go: Confirmed Dates & Weather Warnings 05:20 - Getting There: Haridwar, Roads & Google Maps Warning 07:05 - Where to Stay & Eat (Pahari Food Guide) 08:50 - Temple Timings & Planning Your Darshan 10:15 - The 2026 Mobile Phone Ban & Cloakrooms 11:30 - VIP Puja Bookings & Abhishek Tickets 12:45 - Stop 1: Yamunotri Trek & Surya Kund 14:10 - Stop 2: Gangotri & Bhagirath Shila 15:25 - The Longest Drive: Panch Prayag & Acclimatization 17:00 - Stop 3: Kedarnath (The 16km Trek & Survival Rules)
